ifEnvironmentVariableIsMissingSetViteclo: • If environment variable is missing, set VITE_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=dhwi5wevf in Vercel
ifImagesDontLoadCheckBrowserNetworkTab: • If images don't load, check browser network tab for 404 errors
ifCorsErrorsVerifyCloudinarySettingsAllo: • If CORS errors, verify Cloudinary settings allow your domain
